title: My BFF is a Tyrant in Training
titleEnglish: My BFF is a Tyrant in Training
synonyms: I Raised My Childhood Friend as a Tyrant
ฉันเลี้ยงเพื่อนสมัยเด็กให้กลายเป็นทรราช
J’ai élevé mon ami d’enfance comme un tyran
synopsis: A young Korean woman is reincarnated inside a novel as Viche Amelian, who according to the story, is to be executed in place of the young prince Jade for assassinating the emperor. After facing her death, she expects to get her old life back, but instead wakes up as a 10-year-old Viche! Could it be that her death failed to turn Jade into a tyrant, as the story foretold? Viche must now figure out where she went wrong, and make sure that this time, Jade becomes the world’s most wicked tyrant! (Source: Tapas) Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: Dream☆Jumbo☆Girl
titleNative: ドリーム☆ジャンボ☆ガール
synopsis: Chie is a girl really anxious about her future and aims for Tokyo University, Kanae is quite a silly girl. One day Kanae decides to buy plenty of lottery tickets, and they hit the first prize! Which means they won 700 millions yens ?! Such a sudden pressure makes Chie unable to concentrate on her exams... Now she's desperate !! With all that money in her pocket she's going to enjoy her life at the fullest ! A money and girls comedy that begins by hitting the jackpot at the lottery !! (Source: Magazine Pocket, translated)

title: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: The JOJOLands
titleRomaji: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: The JOJOLands
titleNative: ジョジョの奇妙な冒険 The JOJOLands
synopsis: The stage is set on a volcanic island in the Pacific Ocean, Hawaii. Jodio Joestar, a young boy living on Oahu Island, harbors the ambition to become a great millionaire. The clue to his goal lies in reaching the pinnacle of the mechanisms of this world. What means will he choose to achieve his objective?
searchTerms: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: The JOJOLands
ジョジョの奇妙な冒険 The JOJOLands
synonyms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 9: The JOJOLands
